_comment: PLACEHOLDER. Replace this file with the real Txoracle IDL for your chosen network (devnet vs mainnet — they differ). It's referenced in TxLINE's docs under 'Runnable Devnet Examples' at /documentation/examples/devnet-examples, and should also be downloadable from their examples repo. Do not attempt to hand-write this file - Anchor IDLs are generated from the on-chain program and must match exactly or `program.methods.subscribe()` will fail.
name: txoracle
